location: Inside a chest in the back of a carriage pulled by two trolls, on the road north of the Foot of the Four Belfries Site of Grace, northwest Liurnia of the Lakes.

source.name: Troll-drawn carriage north of Foot of the Four Belfries

tactics: From Foot of the Four Belfries grace, ride Torrent north up the road to intercept the troll-pulled carriage.
Attacking one of the two Trolls halts the carriage so you can deal with escorts and reach the chest safely.
Watch for aggressive knight/soldier escorts traveling alongside the carriage before looting.
lore: A straight sword set with a shard of blue glintstone, carried by knights sworn to Carian royalty — despite numbering fewer than twenty, their sorcery-augmented swordplay let them stand toe-to-toe with the Golden Order's champions.

builds.name: Int/melee hybrid
builds.why: Even D/D/D scaling across Strength, Dexterity and Intelligence, plus the Carian Grandeur charged-projectile skill, make it a strong pick for a caster who still wants to swing steel.
